nasb.text: ‘I am the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham and Isaac and Jacob.’ Moses shook with fear and would not venture to look.

esv.text: ‘I am the God of your fathers, the God of Abraham and of Isaac and of Jacob.’ And Moses trembled and did not dare to look.

cnv.text: ‘我是你祖宗的　神，就是亞伯拉罕、以撒、雅各的　神。’摩西戰戰兢兢，不敢觀看。

ccb.text: ‘我是你祖先的上帝，是亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各的上帝。’摩西战战兢兢，不敢观看。

csbs.text: ‘我是你祖先的神，就是亚伯拉罕、以撒、雅各的神。’摩西战战兢兢，不敢观看。
